features: Looking for some napkins for your Christmas dinner table? Planning a stylish Xmas party and searching for some finishing touches? Why not pick up a pack of these festive Santa & Friends Christmas Napkins from Kissymix
Made from tissue that’s fully compostable at home, these napkins feature a classic Santa Claus design complete with his friends, bringing a splash of colour to your dining table
These square Father Christmas Napkins measure 33cm x 33cm and are made from a soft, facial quality tissue, with three layers (3ply) for maximum absorbency, perfect for sticky fingers

These napkins are ideal for everyday use or for the festive season, whether you’re hosting Christmas Day this year or planning a Xmas party. They can even be added to your arts and crafts collection for decoupage projects, easily glued to wood, tin and ceramics
Kissymix strives to create quality products for their customers. Each pack contains 20 environmentally-friendly napkins, perfect for catering to all sizes of events
description: Product Description Festive Napkins Whether you’re hosting Christmas Day this year, planning a Xmas party or for your next festive dinner party, these napkins are perfect to accompany your plans. The Perfect Size These 33cm X 33cm festive napkins are the perfect size to complement your Christmas table setting. Versatile Beautiful paper napkins for sticky fingers or can also be used for Xmas decoupage projects, on wood, ceramic, tin etc. Whatever you use them for they are sure to be loved by family and friends of all ages. Dispose of Responsibly Once finished with please dispose of these napkins responsibly.
